texto: An avowed feminist activist and an outspoken bisexual, DiFranco has been candid about the necessity of women musicians identifying with the F-word. "Either you are a feminist or you are a sexist/misogynist," she once wrote. "There is no box marked 'other'".
explicacao: Citação de Marisa Meltzer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “An avowed feminist activist and an outspoken bisexual, DiFranco has been candid about the necessi…” articula reflexao, ani, feminist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como feminist.

frase_original: An avowed feminist activist and an outspoken bisexual, DiFranco has been candid about the necessity of women musicians identifying with the F-word. "Either you are a feminist or you are a sexist/misogynist," she once wrote. "There is no box marked 'other'".
